subcodes.title: Words spoken at the Shrine of the Bab in Mar 1910
subcodes.first_line: O my daughter, you ask so many things, that His Holiness Bahá'u'lláh could instruct you for many days and weeks!... The Lord God pleased to give the human being three great mysteries
subcodes.subjects: @free will and predestination; fate, @justice and wrath of God, @relationship of the soul to the body, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @soul is the essential reality of man
